channel.title: HoopsHype — NBA Coaching Rumors
channel.description: Coaching rumors aggregated from HoopsHype. Unofficial personal feed; all content belongs to HoopsHype and the original reporters.

item.title: Miami Heat: Congratulations to Coach Bob McAdoo on being awarded the 2026 Tex Winter Assistant Coac...
item.description:
Congratulations to Coach Bob McAdoo on being awarded the 2026 Tex Winter Assistant Coach Lifetime Impact Award! 🤝

Source: x.com

item.title: NBA: Bob McAdoo, a longtime NBA Assistant Coach and a member of the Naismith Memorial Basket...
item.description:
Bob McAdoo, a longtime NBA Assistant Coach and a member of the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame, is the recipient of the 2026 Tex Winter Assistant Coach Lifetime Impact Award, the National Basketball Coaches Association (NBCA) announced today. “Bob McAdoo is one of the true giants of our game,” said J.B. Bickerstaff, Detroit Pistons Head Coach and NBCA President. “A Hall of Fame player, a champion, and an exceptional Coach, Bob has impacted generations of players through his knowledge, humility, and passion for teaching. His influence can be seen in the many players, coaches, and the Heat organization that he helped elevate throughout his coaching career. Congratulations to Coach McAdoo on this well-deserved recognition.”

Source: nbacoaches.com

item.title: Miami Heat: “I am grateful, honored and humbled to have been selected by the NBCA Selection Committ...
item.description:
“I am grateful, honored and humbled to have been selected by the NBCA Selection Committee for the 2026 Tex Winter Assistant Coach Lifetime Impact Award,” said Coach Bob McAdoo. “One never receives this type of award by oneself. I’d like to thank my wife Patrizia and family for all their love and support. I will be forever grateful to Pat Riley who took me on as an assistant coach for a fantastic NBA journey together. Thanks also to the Arison Family and the HEAT organization who have made an impact on my life both professionally and personally.”

Source: nbacoaches.com

item.title: Minnesota Timberwolves: "How much of his style helped you prepare for what you are about to embark upon?" Micah...
item.description:
"How much of his style helped you prepare for what you are about to embark upon?" Micah Nori: "The one thing that coach Finch is, he is very very good at what he does. Number one, there's no paranoia with him and the other thing is he will let you coach and gives you a voice. When those things happen, I was fortunate to be with him for a long time and work with him. Philosophy-wise and the way we think about basketball is very very similar."

Source: YouTube

item.title: Atlanta Hawks: Brad Rowland: After Antonio Lang was the head coach in Utah, the Hawks are turning HC d...
item.description:
Brad Rowland: After Antonio Lang was the head coach in Utah, the Hawks are turning HC duties over to Sanjay Lumpkin in Vegas . First time as a Summer League HC for Lumpkin.

Source: x.com

item.title: Atlanta Hawks: After the Hawks declined Kuminga’s $24.3 million team option on June 29, Lakers preside...
item.description:
After the Hawks declined Kuminga’s $24.3 million team option on June 29, Lakers president of basketball operations/general manager Rob Pelinka and coach JJ Redick met with Kuminga the following day. A part of the Lakers’ free-agency pitch to Kuminga, a source told the California Post, was the Lakers seeing Kuminga as a high-level, starting wing who would complete the vision of their roster reconstruction around superstar guard Luka Doncic .

Source: New York Post

item.title: Tony Parker and former teammate Patty Mills are together again with EuroLeague club LDL...
item.description:
Tony Parker and former teammate Patty Mills are together again with EuroLeague club LDLC ASVEL Villeurbanne. Parker recently took over as the team's head coach, while Mills signed with the French club this offseason.

Source: San Antonio Express-News

item.title: Toronto Raptors: Michael Grange: Raptors notes from Las Vegas: look for longtime NBA assistant Stephen S...
item.description:
Michael Grange: Raptors notes from Las Vegas: look for longtime NBA assistant Stephen Silas to join Darko Rajakovic’s staff shortly. Silas has worked for Don Nelson, Rick Carlisle & his father, Paul Silas in 25yr career. Former head coach w Rockets, recently coached Team USA in WC Qualifying.

Source: bsky.app

item.title: Toronto Raptors: Michael Grange: Former Raptors assistant Mike Batiste has taken a lead assistant job wi...
item.description:
Michael Grange: Former Raptors assistant Mike Batiste has taken a lead assistant job with his old club Panathinaikos in the EuroLeague. James Wade won’t be back with Raptors.

Source: bsky.app

item.title: Miami Heat: In the offseason, the Bucks replaced coach Doc Rivers with Taylor Jenkins. Yet Horst de...
item.description:
In the offseason, the Bucks replaced coach Doc Rivers with Taylor Jenkins. Yet Horst denied feeling any pressure that the team was forced to trade Antetokounmpo this summer. "This was not a 'have to,'" Horst said. "This was, we truly believed we've found an opportunity which is unique. We might be right. We might be wrong. But an opportunity where this is what's best for him and what he wants to pursue going forward, and this is what's best for us and what we want to pursue going forward. And that's why we made the decision.”

Source: ESPN

item.title: Miami Heat: Giannis Antetokounmpo on his post-retirement plans: "Either I'm going to be a stay-at-h...
item.description:
Giannis Antetokounmpo on his post-retirement plans: "Either I'm going to be a stay-at-home dad, or I'm going to be a coach. I want to be a coach in the NBA."

Source: YouTube

item.title: Sacramento Kings: The Sacramento Kings and assistant coach Bobby Jackson are parting ways . Sources confi...
item.description:
The Sacramento Kings and assistant coach Bobby Jackson are parting ways . Sources confirmed to KCRA 3's Sean Cunningham and Sports Director Michelle Dapper that the former King was leaving head coach Doug Christie's staff. He had been tasked with running the team's defense.

Source: KCRA.com

item.title: Atlanta Hawks: The Los Angeles Lakers continue to actively pursue unrestricted free agent wing Jonatha...
item.description:
The Los Angeles Lakers continue to actively pursue unrestricted free agent wing Jonathan Kuminga, but they have not yet given him an enticing enough offer to commit, league sources told ESPN on Tuesday. After his $24.3 million team option was declined by the Atlanta Hawks on June 29, Kuminga met virtually the next day with Lakers general manager Rob Pelinka and coach JJ Redick, who pitched him on a vision of being a high-minutes wing next to Luka Doncic in a spacious on-court environment conducive to his skill set, league sources told ESPN.

Source: ESPN

item.title: Atlanta Hawks: The Cleveland Cavaliers also continue to have interest in Kuminga, league sources told...
item.description:
The Cleveland Cavaliers also continue to have interest in Kuminga, league sources told ESPN. Kuminga has a high level of comfort with Cavaliers coach Kenny Atkinson, who coached Kuminga during his first three NBA seasons as a lead assistant for the Golden State Warriors. The Cavaliers , however, are currently wrapped in the LeBron James sweepstakes, leaving the Lakers as the most aggressive pursuer prior to the James domino falling.

Source: ESPN
